changeSet.author: dima mikhalishchin
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_model_ks.product_models ( id TEXT, name TEXT, description TEXT, product_group_id TEXT, owner_id TEXT, deleted BOOLEAN, lock TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (id) );

changeSet.author: dima mikhalishchin
changeSet.sql: CREATE CUSTOM INDEX IF NOT EXISTS product_models_name_idx ON product_model_ks.product_models (name) USING 'StorageAttachedIndex' WITH OPTIONS = {'case_sensitive': 'false', 'normalize': 'true', 'ascii': 'true'};

changeSet.author: dima mikhalishchin
changeSet.sql: CREATE CUSTOM INDEX IF NOT EXISTS product_models_description_idx ON product_model_ks.product_models (description) USING 'StorageAttachedIndex' WITH OPTIONS = {'case_sensitive': 'false', 'normalize': 'true', 'ascii': 'true'};
